# jamfprotect_telemetry (List Resource)

Lists telemetry v2 configurations in Jamf Protect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "jamfprotect_exception_set" "example" {
  provider = jamfprotect
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name_prefix` (String) Optional name prefix filter applied to listed telemetry configurations.
